// ChallengeModes: Every // key is documentation; the following properties list real settings in the same order. Nested objects use // lines first, then values (same order).
// Enabled: Master switch: false disables ChallengeModes Harmony patches (Meta.json Enabled should match for clean testing).
// EnableArcaneLore: Special skill usage XP for Arcane Lore (when wired).
// EnableManaConversion: Special skill usage XP for Mana Conversion (when wired).
// ArcaneLoreXpPerMana: Arcane Lore XP per mana spent (when enabled).
// ManaConversionXpPerMana: Mana Conversion XP per mana spent (when enabled).
// FutureAptitude: Reserved for future aptitude systems (not wired).
// MaxLevel: Extended character level cap (PortalDat XP table); merged from former AureatePath.
// CreditInterval: Interval used with extended leveling / credit progression.
// LevelCost: XP cost curve for levels above vanilla table (C, Rate, Coefficient, Offset, GrowthType). Inside LevelCost: // lines first, then values (same order).
// AlternateLeveling: Alternate leveling costs and property ranges. Inside AlternateLeveling: // lines first, then values (same order); each Attribute/Vital/Trained/Specialized is a LevelCost block.
// BonusStatsEnabled: Adds Creature.GetBonus on top of InitLevel / StartingValue when true.
// HardcoreSecondsBetweenDeathAllowed: Minimum seconds between deaths counted for hardcore rules.
// HardcoreStartingLives: Starting life count for hardcore mode.
// ChallengeAchievementRewardsEnabled: Challenge achievement skill credits + permanent XP/lum %.
// ChallengeAchievementLevels: Skill credits: +1 per active mode (SSF/HC/alt/apt) per level, each mode once forever.
// ChallengeAchievementPercentEach: Skill credit grants only (display); XP/lum % uses ChallengeBonusPercentPerLevel.
// ChallengeBonusPercentPerLevel: Percent per level toward current segment (0.01 = 0.01% per level; 60 levels => 0.6%).
// ChallengeBonusSegmentCapLevel: Completing this level banks one segment and resets in-run progress (default 300).
// ChallengeModeDefaultTitles: Future wishlist: CharacterTitle IDs if nameplate titles are implemented; not wired.
// CmQuitRequiresConfirmation: When true, /cm quit shows Yes/No before penalties.
// CmQuitUnequipAll: When true, unequip all to main pack before strips.
// QuestPointsMultiplierWhileChallengeAc: Loremaster: base factor m for QB; with QuestPointsMultiplyPerActiveChallengeTrack true, scale is m^n where n = CountActiveChallengeTracks (SSF, HC, aptitude-or-alternate).
// QuestPointsMultiplyPerActiveChallenge: When true (default), m^n per active tracks (e.g. m=2, SSF+HC => 4×). When false, m once if any challenge (legacy 2×).

LevelCost.// C: Base cost constant (meaning depends on GrowthType: linear base, exponential base, polynomial base term).
LevelCost.// Rate: Growth rate / exponent parameter (linear slope per step, exponential base, polynomial power).
LevelCost.// Coefficient: Polynomial coefficient (used when GrowthType is Polynomial).
LevelCost.// Offset: Index offset applied before cost formulas.

AlternateLeveling.// Enabled: When true, alternate leveling hooks are available for opted-in players.
AlternateLeveling.// LevelPropertyStart: Starting fake property id range for alternate level storage.
AlternateLeveling.// SpentPropertyStart: Starting fake property id range for spent alternate progression.
AlternateLeveling.// PreferStandard: Prefer standard ACE leveling when both paths apply.
AlternateLeveling.// OffsetByLastStandard: Offset alternate costs by last standard level reached.
AlternateLeveling.// Attribute: XP cost curve for alternate attribute buys. Inside: // lines first, then values (same order).
AlternateLeveling.// Vital: XP cost curve for alternate vital buys. Inside: // lines first, then values (same order).
AlternateLeveling.// Trained: XP cost curve for trained skill progression. Inside: // lines first, then values (same order).
AlternateLeveling.// Specialized: XP cost curve for specialized skill progression. Inside: // lines first, then values (same order).

Attribute.// C: Base cost constant (meaning depends on GrowthType: linear base, exponential base, polynomial base term).
Attribute.// Rate: Growth rate / exponent parameter (linear slope per step, exponential base, polynomial power).
Attribute.// Coefficient: Polynomial coefficient (used when GrowthType is Polynomial).
Attribute.// Offset: Index offset applied before cost formulas.
